message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequence {
    ArrowColor cyan
    ActorBorderColor cyan
    ActorBackgroundColor transparent
    ParticipantBorderColor cyan
    ParticipantBackgroundColor cyan
    LifeLineBorderColor cyan
    LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
}

title Please use '!option handwritten true' to enable handwritten

actor developer as dev
participant "DEV" as DEV
participant "TEST" as TEST
participant "MASTER" as MASTER
participant "HOTFIX" as HOTFIX

activate DEV
DEV ->> TEST: 1 增量换包到TEST
activate TEST
TEST --> MASTER: 2 测试通过后，基于TEST打tag
TEST --> MASTER: 3 check release分支
TEST --> MASTER: 4 将release分支合并到MASTER
activate MASTER
MASTER --> HOTFIX: 5，线上紧急问题，基于MASTER check HOTFIX分支
activate HOTFIX
HOTFIX --> HOTFIX: 6，开发基于HOTFIX分支check本地分支修复问题
HOTFIX --> HOTFIX: 7 修复完成后合回HOTFIX分支
HOTFIX --> TEST: 8 用CMP工具基于HOTFIX打包换到测试环境进行验证
HOTFIX --> MASTER: 9 测试通过后，HOTFIX合回MASTER
HOTFIX --> TEST: 10 测试通过后，HOTFIX合回TEST
HOTFIX --> DEV: 11 测试通过后，HOTFIX合回DEV
deactivate HOTFIX
deactivate MASTER
deactivate TEST
deactivate DEV

@enduml
```
